summary: Geräte-Lifecycle-Management System vollständig getestet. Alle Backend-APIs (16 Tests) und Frontend-UI-Funktionen arbeiten korrekt. CRUD-Operationen, Timeline-Events und alle Modals funktionieren einwandfrei.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Device Lifecycle Management is fully functional. Access via /portal/admin -> Geräte-Lifecycle tab. All CRUD operations, timeline events, and modals work correctly.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/device-lifecycle/list - Returns device list with filters (status, device_type, search)
GET /api/device-lifecycle/stats - Returns statistics (total, by_status, by_type, warranty/license expiring)
GET /api/device-lifecycle/types - Returns all device types (8 types)
POST /api/device-lifecycle/create - Creates new device with initial lifecycle event
PUT /api/device-lifecycle/{id} - Updates device and creates lifecycle events
DELETE /api/device-lifecycle/{id} - Deletes device and its timeline events
Full lifecycle integration test (Create -> Update -> Add Events -> Delete)
frontend_ui_tests: Device list displays correctly with 2 devices
Stats cards show correct counts (Gesamt, Aktiv, Im Lager, Defekt, Außer Betrieb)
Detail Modal opens with device data and timeline
Edit Modal opens with pre-filled form data
Create Modal (Neues Gerät) opens with empty form
Event Modal (Event hinzufügen) opens with event type selector
Create device via UI - device appears in list with toast notification
Delete device via UI - device removed with confirmation and toast notification
Timeline displays events with icons and dates

crud_operations.create: Working - creates device with initial lifecycle event
crud_operations.read: Working - list with filters, single device, timeline
crud_operations.update: Working - updates device and creates change events
crud_operations.delete: Working - removes device and all timeline events

frontend_modals.detail_modal: Shows device data, status, location, timeline with events
frontend_modals.edit_modal: Pre-filled form with all device fields
frontend_modals.create_modal: Empty form with device type selector
frontend_modals.event_modal: Event type selector with description textarea
